text: And she kept saving Rasool-Allah™~ by her chest and her breasts until a lot of injuries hit her, and Ibn Qamiya attacked upon Rasool-Allah™*** and said, ‘Show me Muhammad****| There is no survival if he**** survives’. He struck him upon his shoulder and called out, ‘I have killed Muhammad***, by Al-Laat and Al-Uzza (two idols)!’ And Rasool-Allah**** looked at a ‘man from the Emigrants who had cast his shield behind his back, and he was in the defeat. He™*™™ said to him, ‘O one with the shield! Throw away your shield and pass to the Fire". So, he threw down his shield, and Rasool-Allah**** said: ‘O Naseyba! Take the shield’. She took the shield and fought the Polytheists.
